claimText: The University of Melbourne has adopted AI Principles designed to guide actions around the adoption and use of AI tools and systems across the institution.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: This guidance is also influenced by the University of Melbourne AI Principles, which have been designed to guide actions around the adoption and use of AI tools and systems.

citation.citationTitle: What Is This Guide? - Melbourne School of Design
